section.heading: Leasing surplus Federal property

content.p: The Administrator may receive surplus Federal property (including facilities) and may lease such property to States and units of general local government for use in or as facilities for juvenile offenders, or for use in or as facilities for delinquency prevention and treatment activities.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 93–415, title II, § 299H, as added Pub. L. 107–273, div. C, title II, § 12218, Nov. 2, 2002, 116 Stat. 1893.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 5679 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective on the first day of the first fiscal year that begins after Nov. 2, 2002, and applicable only with respect to fiscal years beginning on or after the first day of the first fiscal year that begins after Nov. 2, 2002, see section 12223 of Pub. L. 107–273, set out as an Effective Date of 2002 Amendment note under section 11101 of this title.
